member.name: T:nxm.ui.model.document.model_document_
member.summary: model-document base class for deriving. model-document holds complete 'data-set' for particular operation
create,run and destroy model document using variant-set parametrs
create,run and destroy basic model document with basic/empty creation parameters result is of type void
create,run and destroy basic model document with basic/empty creation parameters result is of type TResult
create,run and destroy model document - advanced override (void result)
create,run and destroy model document - advanced override (with TResult result)

member.summary: append static list of children (it means: version isn't changed and possible changes in source enumerable will not be seen)

member.summary: append static list of children (it means: version isn't changed and eventual changes in source enumerable will not be seen)

member.name: T:nxm.app.model.settings.chained_setting_subject_children_provider
member.summary: simply concatenates 2 providers (version tailored to 2-item case, in scenarios when chaining more items use composite-setting-subject-children-provider

member.summary: update collection and returns offered children collection version

member.summary: update collection and returns offered children collection version

member.summary: provides EUC factory solely from setting-entity-info (most standard version)

member.summary: editable unit configuration hints this structure is prepared for client for parsing and creating appropiate user interface

member.name: T:nxm.app.model.settings.stock_euc_id
member.summary: build-in ("well known") editable unit config ID definitions

member.name: T:nxm.app.model.settings.euc_creation_context.list_field_creation_params
member.summary: parameters used to create list field (either raw-list or model-list)

member.name: P:nxm.app.model.settings.euc_creation_context.list_field_creation_params.base_mlqp
member.summary: model-list-query params used as base for tuning when untuned returns 'all records', whatever it means

member.name: P:nxm.app.model.settings.euc_creation_context.list_field_creation_params.provider_id
member.summary: optional provider ID when non-default is used

member.name: P:nxm.app.model.settings.euc_creation_context.list_field_creation_params.collector
member.summary: optional context-aware collector for 'pre-tuning' queries in dependence of surrounding object/document/environment

member.summary: interface implemented by top-level model object holding settings values (application side view)

member.summary: optional setting instance id (for multi-variant settings)

member.name: T:nxm.app.model.settings.isetting_item_model_object
member.summary: interface implemented by model object being item of bigger setting-model-object (this interface is intended for use on application level)

member.summary: provide setting item description based on current values (usefull for parametr-settings)

member.summary: base class for setting-item wrapper as model-object (may be used as container)

member.summary: provide setting item description based on current values (usefull for parametr-settings)
